description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fixed an issue where .zip files were displayed in worlds/data packs.  
2. Fixed an issue where manually canceling a mod update check would pop up an operation failure message.  
3. Re-enabled MCIM acceleration.  
4. Fixed an issue where some Modrinth modpacks could not be imported.  
5. Refactored and optimized the inventory, added double-click to swap items to the off-hand.  
6. Fixed an issue where the cursor was locked to the center of the screen in some mod UI interfaces.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复世界/数据包中显示.zip文件的问题
2.修复手动取消模组更新检查会弹窗操作失败的问题
3.重新启用MCIM加速
4.修复无法导入部分Modrinth整合包的问题
5.重构优化物品栏，添加双击交换副手的功能
6.修复部分模组UI界面中光标被锁定在屏幕中心的问题
